debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ Set ↑A ∼ ↑(𝒫 A)

proof:
by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨Y, hY⟩
    have h1 : Y ∈ range (val_image A) := by
      rw [range_val_image A]
      exact hY
    match h1 with
    | ⟨X, hX⟩ =>
      exists X
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact hX
successful_attempts:
by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intro X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congrArg Subtype.val h
  · intro ⟨Y, hY⟩
    have h1 : Y ∈ range (val_image A) := by
      rw [range_val_image A]
      exact hY
    match h1 with
    | ⟨X, hX⟩ =>
      exists X
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact hX
